# Contributing

Testing, documentation, examples, suggestions, and constructive criticism are welcome. The easiest starting point is the Instant Demise Support Discord.

Ways to help include:

- Windows and Linux testing
- conversion comparisons and reproducible bug reports
- BBS integration examples
- documentation, tutorials, and how-to guides
- profile and configuration sharing
- CP437, ANSI, BIN, and SAUCE workflow knowledge
- performance and usability feedback
- sample images you have permission to share

The project also welcomes people interested in learning and helping others use Rez2ANS Next effectively. Keep contributions respectful of the artists, history, and culture of ANSI art.

Source code is not being accepted through this release repository at present.
